title: Blue Netherite x Bare Bones
description: this project combines two resource packs, Blue Netherite and Bare Bones
body:
### **request Bare Bones**

**this project combines two resource packs, [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) and  [Blue Netherite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blue-netherite)**

![put the resource packs like this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ffe61f3c907b7aa26e819fd1b79192247f8976c_0.webp)


**Blue Netherite** - A Texturepack that helps when mining netherite.

**Bare Bones** - Minecraft with the style of the trailers
